name: Collector's Cocoa Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream butter or margarine and sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add eggs and vanilla; beat for 1 minute at medium speed.
3. Combine flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt; add alternately with water (or coffee) to the creamed mixture.
4. Pour batter into 2 greased and floured cake pans.
5. Bake at 350°F for 35-40 minutes in 8-inch pans; 30-35 minutes in 9-inch pans.
6. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from pans.
7. Cool completely before frosting.
